name: browser-qa-rewrite
description: Checks that browser QA rewrites reference live verification, evidence, and no-code-change boundaries.
user_request: Use $prompt-rewrite to make this better for Codex: qa the onboarding flow in browser on mobile and desktop, give bugs with proof, don't fix yet
context: The prompt is for another Codex run.
No URL is supplied, so the rewrite should include a URL placeholder or assumption.
expected_behavior: Produces a browser-QA prompt with mobile and desktop viewport coverage.
Requires evidence such as screenshots, console/network errors, reproduction steps, expected versus actual behavior, and severity.
Preserves the report-only boundary and says not to make code changes.
Mentions use of visible browser QA skills only conditionally or with exact visible skill names if available.
red_flags: Tells the agent to fix the bugs.
Invents a concrete URL or installed skill that was not provided or visible.
